meaning: adj.被责难的,被宣告有罪的
examples: A judge yesterday condemned heroin as evil.
They condemned the deal as a craven surrender.
Compulsive gamblers are more to be pitied than condemned.
Sinn Fein's Martin McGuinness condemned the threats and said the IRA was not involved.
Are we condemned to drink this electronic bacteria with each sip of real traffic?
